name: Opening the EduHear project card navigates to its detail page
description: From the projects listing, clicking the EduHear project title opens its dedicated detail page with matching content.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Projects' link in the sidebar navigation
Verify the browser navigates to a project detail page at /projects/eduhear
Verify the detail page shows the EduHear project title and a description mentioning the audio-first learning platform and database schema design
